snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: Deterministic Markdown chunk metadata and local scale review
reviewers.independence: An independent reviewer cleared the exact frozen Development bytes. Product Planning reproduced both supplied hashes, empty index and diff-check, then reviewed the existing owners, exact selectors, authorized status boundary and open retrieval/platform work without changing Development bytes.

dimensions.summary: Existing Technical Architecture, Local Database, Performance, Quality and Playbook owners locate chunk/index/scale truth without a new document or UI surface.
Owners agree on metadata-only schema v2/index revision 4, deterministic chunking, warm signatures and fencing, body-free scale evidence, and the still-open vector/semantic/platform boundaries.
Three exact selectors move only PIGE-SEARCH-003 and E6.02 from planned to partial; semantic lock v3 has 1,207 claims and all other Requirement, Exit and phase statuses remain unchanged.
Development gets exact chunk, database and 10k/100k scale selectors plus measured warm Library and Latin/CJK retrieval evidence; semantic/vector and release-scale acceptance remain explicitly open.
No Markdown file or decision is added; relevant owners and trace entries are compressed without changing unrelated semantics, keeping every leanness budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact frozen candidate plus current recipe passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate test, package and distribution evidence
verification.evidence: Focused 4/27, broader 8/89 and full 109 files plus one skipped with 1,261 tests plus one skipped pass; typecheck, build, rebuild worker, macOS package and packaged smoke pass. The scale report records 10,000 pages, 100,000 chunks, 11,862 ms rebuild, Library 148.42 ms, Latin 208.91 ms and CJK 303.39 ms maxima.

verification.command: npm run verify:dependencies && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The candidate retains 57 dependency records with zero waivers; CON-001 through CON-004 and semantic lock v3/1,207 pass. Only the authorized PIGE-SEARCH-003 and E6.02 statuses change from planned to partial.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 56 Markdown files, 3,466 entry words, 3,792 trace lines, 249,977 trace bytes and 1,212,960 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Deterministic Markdown chunk metadata and local scale evidence
coordination.compatibility: This candidate changes only the rebuildable local database schema/index and executable scale evidence; durable Markdown, public IPC, dependencies, UI, permissions, providers and product scope are unchanged.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact d1255b8b/1906ddc6 bytes. Product Planning synchronized existing owners, acceptance, the two authorized partial statuses, semantic lock and this recipe without changing Development bytes.

nonBlockingRisks: Embeddings, vector indexing, semantic retrieval/reranking and complete retrieval acceptance remain open.
Packaged cross-platform scale, renderer first-render and memory budgets, 100GB vault evidence and broader recovery matrices remain open.
Final userspace identity-check-to-filesystem syscall intervals remain platform primitive residuals; no cross-file transaction claim is added.
